Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents research or learning course with an embedded video track

Quiz.title: Quiz
Quiz.description: Represents an interactive quiz comprising questions for a specific course

questions.description: List of quiz questions with options and answer keys

UserProgress.title: UserProgress
UserProgress.description: Records user completion status and history of quiz performance

/courses/{courseId}.description: Main curriculum contents containing details on video chapters

/quizzes/{quizId}.description: Assessments tied to a specific course page

/userProgress/{userId}.description: Durable private learning status and dashboard grades for each user
